name: Single (1-Shot)
prompt: Vertical iPhone screenshot of a young Black woman standing alone in her bedroom talking, full body visible head to toe, natural daylight from a window to her left casting soft uneven light, grey hoodie and joggers, braids, slightly off-centre in the frame like she propped her phone against something on a shelf, real messy bedroom behind her with an unmade bed and stuff on the desk, iPhone rear camera quality with slight grain and warm tones, not posed, mid-sentence expression, 9:16 vertical

name: Two-Shot
prompt: Vertical iPhone screenshot of a young Black woman and another person sitting together on a sofa in a lived-in living room, both visible from the waist up, she is wearing a grey hoodie with braids and talking while the other person listens, natural daylight from a nearby window, warm brown skin, the phone is propped on a coffee table filming them, real room background with cushions and a remote on the sofa, iPhone rear camera quality with slight grain, mid-conversation moment, 9:16 vertical

name: Group Shot
prompt: Vertical iPhone screenshot of a young Black woman in a grey hoodie with braids standing with two friends in a kitchen, all three visible from knees up, she is in the middle talking and gesturing, natural overhead kitchen light mixing with some daylight, real kitchen background with mugs on the counter and a fridge with magnets, the other two are reacting and laughing, iPhone rear camera quality with slight warmth and grain, casual energy not posed, 9:16 vertical

name: Close-Up (CU)
prompt: Vertical iPhone screenshot extreme close-up of a young Black woman's face from forehead to chin filling most of the frame, braids visible at the top, warm brown skin with natural texture visible, she is mid-sentence with an expressive look, natural daylight hitting one side of her face from a window creating soft shadows, slightly out of focus background showing a blurred bedroom, iPhone rear camera quality with that slightly soft warm look, minimal makeup, 9:16 vertical

name: Extreme Close-Up (ECU)

name: Medium Shot (MS)

name: Medium Close-Up (MCU)
